CustomField.description: Per-dimension approval lifecycle for a below-margin-floor Services line (Not Required / Pending / Approved / Rejected). Automation-only: QuoteTriggerHandler escalates to Pending from DealDeskService.requiresFinanceReview (the per-line services-floor check) and the Services Margin approval process records the decision. One of the three independent dimensions (discount / legal / finance) that replace the single conflated Approval_Status__c gate.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Finance (services margin) approval lifecycle. Maintained by the Quote trigger and the services margin approval process.
CustomField.label: Finance Approval Status
